scripts.build: bun run --filter @arrivd/core build && bun run --filter './packages/*' build
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/*/dist apps/*/dist node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules
scripts.publish:all: bun run build && cd packages/core && bun publish --access public && cd ../email && bun publish --access public && cd ../hooks && bun publish --access public && cd ../cron && bun publish --access public
